risk_threshold.description: Counterfeits are priced high enough to seem 'real' but far below retail.  A 'Rolex' at $150 or 'Jordans' at $45 are classic surikae price points.

legal_reference.name: Trafficking in Counterfeit Goods or Services
legal_reference.summary: Intentionally trafficking in goods or services using a counterfeit mark.

jp_legal_reference.name: Unfair Competition Prevention Act
jp_legal_reference.summary: Prohibits use of well-known trade marks and sale of counterfeit goods in Japan.
